c.d: Number of active users or downloads indicating marketplace size and audience reach
Commission or listing fees percentage or fixed amount charged by the app per sale
How quickly and easily a seller can upload photos and create a listing
Availability and flexibility of shipping choices such as prepaid labels, local pickup or home pickup
Specific niche or product categories the app is best suited for selling
Whether the app supports local, national, or international sales
Quality and user-friendliness of the app interface for buying and selling
